hooks.command: bash -c 'mods=""; for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$f" | grep -qE "geoseg/modules/[^/]+/.*\.py$"; then mod=$(echo "$f" | sed -E "s|.*modules/([^/]+)/.*|\1|"); mods="$mods $mod"; fi; done; for mod in $(echo "$mods" | tr " " "\n" | sort -u); do demo="geoseg/modules/$mod/demo.py"; if [ -f "$demo" ]; then echo "[hook] Running demo for module: $mod"; python -m geoseg.modules.$mod.demo 2>&1 | tail -20; fi; done'

bash -c 'stamp="/Users/daiduo2/geoseg/.claude/.doc_sync_stamp"; if [ -f "$stamp" ] && [ "$(find "$stamp" -mmin -60 2>/dev/null)" ]; then exit 0; fi; cd /Users/daiduo2/geoseg; issues=0; for d in geoseg/modules/*/; do mod=$(basename "$d"); [ "$mod" = "__pycache__" ] && continue; if ! grep -q "$mod/" docs/CODEBASE.md 2>/dev/null; then echo "[DOC SYNC] New module missing in CODEBASE.md: $mod/"; issues=1; fi; done; for f in geoseg/gui/*.py; do [ -f "$f" ] || continue; name=$(basename "$f"); if ! grep -q "$name" docs/CODEBASE.md 2>/dev/null; then echo "[DOC SYNC] New GUI file missing in CODEBASE.md: $name"; issues=1; fi; done; for d in geoseg/modules/*/; do mod=$(basename "$d"); [ "$mod" = "__pycache__" ] && continue; if [ ! -f "geoseg/modules/$mod/CLAUDE.md" ]; then echo "[DOC SYNC] Module missing CLAUDE.md: $mod/"; issues=1; fi; done; if [ $issues -eq 1 ]; then echo "[DOC SYNC] 👉 运行: 为我同步一下文档"; fi; touch "$stamp"'

bash -c 'for f in $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS; do if echo "$f" | grep -q "vlm_client/prompts.py"; then echo "⚠️  [SCHEMA WARNING] You are editing vlm_client/prompts.py."; echo "    Remember: schema change = update ALL consumers + run pytest tests/test_integration_ph01.py"; echo "    See DESIGN.md §4."; fi; done'
